name: Shortbread Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and icing sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Sift together cornflour, all-purpose flour, and salt.
3. Add the sifted mixture to the creamed butter and mix well.
4. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and knead lightly.
5. Divide in half and shape into two rolls, each 1 1/2 inches wide and 6 inches long.
6. Wrap each roll in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 1 hour or until firm.
7. Cut the rolls into 1/4 inch slices.
8. Place the slices on baking trays.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
